title: FireFraggerSword
description: A Sword Minecraft that can charge up and shoot thunder to some one like GOD
body:
![Sword.yml](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f333cd31d16dcccb0a923c549e89ac2b8f8e2d7.png)
# A FireFraggerSword Plugin

</details>



to get the sword server oparator can run the command 
```
/givefragger
```


or on a hypicxel server you can add luckperms [firefragger.give]. so player can also run the command 
```
/givefragger
```
 without getting server op.

by shift clicking for 10sec the sword will charge up and after the charge up eny where the player looking at player can summone thnder.

the sword gives the player health boost 4 , strength 3 , resistence 4 potion effects when the player holding the sword
